parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.fal_prompt }}",
  "image_url": "{{ $json.reference_image_url }}",
  "negative_prompt": "text, watermark, logo, words, letters, caption, brand name, UI elements, app interface, phone screen, chinese characters, overlay, signature, different person, different art style, distorted face",
  "image_size": "square_hd",
  "num_images": 1
}
